$description: Component tokens for Mobile Progress Circle — a circular, half-circle, or quarter-circle ring progress indicator. The ring is rendered as SVG/canvas image assets (not CSS borders). Only one size (xxs = 64px container) is defined. An optional percentage label appears centered inside the ring; an optional sub-label appears below. Figma Reference: Node ID 386-1723

$component.name: Progress Circle
$component.description: A ring-style progress indicator that shows progress as a filled arc around a circular, half-circle, or quarter-circle track. The ring background (track) and filled indicator (progress arc) are rendered as SVG image assets positioned within a 64px container. The filled arc sweeps clockwise from the top. A centered percentage text label overlays the ring interior; an optional descriptive sub-label appears below the ring.
$component.structure: Outer container (size varies by shape). Inner 64px Ring div (absolutely positioned, centered) containing: a Background image (the track ring), a Line image (the filled arc at current progress), and optionally a centered label (percentage) and sub-label (description) text.

sizes.xxs: 64px ring container — the only currently defined size

shape.Circle: Full 360° ring — container is square 64×64px. Ring inset 4.69% on all sides.
shape.Half circle: 180° ring showing only the top semicircle — container is 64px wide × 36px tall (visible portion). Ring is still 64×64px but bottom half is hidden.
shape.Quarter: 90° ring showing only the top-right quadrant — container is 64×64px. Arc fills only the first 90° quadrant.

variants.label: boolean — show/hide the centered percentage text inside the ring
variants.subLabel: boolean — show/hide the descriptive text below the ring (e.g. 'Users')

usage.contexts: Dashboard KPI widgets, storage usage indicators, completion metrics, task progress summaries.
usage.features: 3 ring shapes, centered percentage label, optional sub-label, SVG-rendered ring with track and indicator arc

container.$comment: Outer bounding container — size varies by shape variant

size.description: Mobile progress circle ring container size - 64px (width and height for Circle and Quarter shapes; width only for Half circle which clips the bottom)

height.description: Mobile progress circle Half circle variant visible container height - 36px (top 36px of the 64px ring is shown; bottom half is hidden via overflow/clip)

ring.$comment: The circular ring track and filled arc — rendered as SVG image assets. Inset defines the ring stroke area.

inset.description: Mobile progress circle ring inset from container edges - 4.69% (inset: 4.69% in Figma = ~3px inset on each side of a 64px container, defining the ring stroke width area)

color.description: Mobile progress circle ring track color - gray/200 - #eaecf0 (the unfilled portion of the ring arc)
Mobile progress circle ring indicator arc color - primary/blue/600 - #155eef (the filled progress arc)

label.$comment: Centered percentage label overlaid inside the ring. Positioned at the visual center of the ring container.

typography.description: Mobile progress circle label typography - 14px Medium, 20px line-height (font/size/lg, font/weight/medium, font/line-height/lg)

color.description: Mobile progress circle label text color - gray/700 - #344054

alignment.description: Mobile progress circle label text alignment - center (horizontally centered within the ring)

sub-label.$comment: Optional descriptive text below the ring container — identifies the metric being shown (e.g. 'Users')

typography.description: Mobile progress circle sub-label typography - 12px Medium, 17px line-height (font/size/sm, font/weight/medium, font/line-height/sm)

color.description: Mobile progress circle sub-label text color - gray/600 - #475467 (secondary/descriptive text below the ring)

alignment.description: Mobile progress circle sub-label text alignment - center
